examples: This means the expense for building a tandem hull is commensurate with that for a monohull.
These experienced monohull sailors are relishing the challenge of racing the Extreme 40 catamarans.
This is the sailboat Puma in the 2009 Volvo Ocean Race, one of the fastest monohull sailboats in the world.
Roy Disney's Pyewacket holds the current monohull record of 23 hours and 30 minutes, set in 2002.
Belgium's Bernard Stamm, the current holder of the fastest trans-Atlantic crossing in a monohull, is the race favourite.
